Course Title: AI in Worker Monitoring: Safety vs Privacy
Category: Infrastructure & Construction: Construction, Engineering, Building Materials, Real Estate Development
Who is this for: Construction managers, site supervisors, health and safety officers, project managers, engineering team leads, facilities managers, operations managers
Team or Dept this is for: Health and Safety, Operations, Human Resources, Legal, Construction Management, Engineering
Description: Balancing surveillance, compliance, and worker trust.
Prerequisites: A basic familiarity with construction or engineering site operations, along with a general interest in workplace technology and employee rights, is all you need to get started with this course.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify the key ways AI monitoring technologies are currently used across construction and engineering sites, and explain the legal and ethical boundaries that govern their use in the United Kingdom. You will also be able to apply practical frameworks to balance worker privacy with site safety requirements, helping you build trust within your teams while maintaining compliance with relevant regulations.
